claude-project.porting_note: Keep project instructions concise and move durable reference material to project knowledge.

custom-gpt.porting_note: Translate tool references to Actions or mark unsupported.

gemini-gem.porting_note: Map uploaded knowledge to available Google context surfaces.

api.porting_note: Represent instructions and output contracts as code-owned artifacts.

unknown.porting_note: Ask for target runtime before making platform-specific claims.
